name: Migration path CLI workflows to GAX
current_usage_summary: CLI migration is bottom-up: wrap the 20 commands agents actually run (from shell logs), not entire gh/aws CLIs. Prototype uses exec adapter mapping gh.pr.list to `gh pr list --json …`. Agents switch from `run_terminal_cmd('gh pr list …')` to `gax gh.pr.list --surface model`. Governance uplift is the reason to migrate—token savings secondary vs MCP but still real vs naive MCP.
typical_stack: Start: AGENTS.md rules + shell. Target: gax CLI + gaxd + manifests in git. CI: OIDC → cap mint → gax in pipeline. Standards overlap: CLI Agent Spec envelope {ok,data,error} ≈ GAX envelope v1.
auth_and_identity_model: Move from ambient GITHUB_TOKEN to vault-stored token only gaxd reads; agent holds GAX_CAP JWT with command allowlist and TTL. Device flow login (roadmap) for developers. CI uses workload identity federation.
context_and_token_behavior: Structured envelope ends fragile stdout parsing. surface=model caps rows/fields. Agents stop seeing 500-line gh output.
operational_pain_points: Incomplete manifest coverage forces fallback shell—undermines policy. gh CLI updates may break exec templates.
developer_experience_friction: Writing manifests for irregular CLIs (interactive, TUI). Testing manifests in CI.
gax_mapping: exec/http/mock adapters; registry YAML; policy allowlist; audit.jsonl; projection layer—all in prototype gax/ package.
migration_phases: 1) Log analysis → top commands. 2) Manifest + exec adapter. 3) AGENTS.md mandate. 4) Pre-commit or sandbox wrapper blocks raw gh. 5) Expand to aws/kubectl via OpenAPI generator. 6) plan executor replaces multi-step shell scripts.
adapter_or_bridge_strategy: exec adapter with argv templates; optional wrapper scripts checked into repo. For JSON-less CLIs, adapter runs jq transform inside gaxd. CLI Agent Spec compliant CLIs need thinner manifests.
breaking_changes_and_mitigations: Loss of pipe composition—gax plan + jq flag. Muscle memory—provide `gax` completions and doc parity with gh help.
infrastructure_changes: gaxd on dev laptops; secrets removed from agent-visible .env; audit ship to central store.
deployment_topology: Identical command names local and CI; caps differ by TTL and scope.
adoption_drivers: Security bans ambient tokens in agent sandboxes. Predictable JSON for evals/benchmarks.
adoption_blockers: Low friction of raw shell for solo devs. 'Good enough' gh --json.
adoption_timeline_estimate: Mandatory for enterprise CI agents in 12–18 months; optional for local git indefinitely.
historical_parallel: Moving from shell mysql to ORM/query API—less flexible, safer and measurable.
